headline: GameStop Seeks to Boost Share Count as eBay Pursuit Continues After Rejection
summary: Gaming retailer GameStop wants to add 1.5 billion shares to its authorized share count as it seeks to maximize financial flexibility.

raw.headline: GameStop Seeks to Boost Share Count as eBay Pursuit Continues After Rejection
raw.summary: Gaming retailer GameStop wants to add 1.5 billion shares to its authorized share count as it seeks to maximize financial flexibility.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks with Open Questions
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: GameStop Seeks Shareholder Approval To More Than Double Its Authorized Shares – A Look At The Important Figures
summary: GameStop stated in its filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission that it is seeking shareholder approval to increase its authorized common shares to 2.5 billion from 1 billion.

raw.headline: GameStop Seeks Shareholder Approval To More Than Double Its Authorized Shares – A Look At The Important Figures
raw.summary: GameStop stated in its filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission that it is seeking shareholder approval to increase its authorized common shares to 2.5 billion from 1 billion.

headline: GameStop seeks investor approval to expand authorized share count to 2.5B
summary: GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) is requesting the approval of its shareholders to significantly increase its authorized share capital to as many as 2.5 billion shares, up from about 450 million, according to a Securities and Exchange Commission filing released Thursday. The company said the proposal...

headline: eBay (EBAY) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of online marketplace eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after GameStop increased its stake in the company as a takeover battle escalates.

raw.summary: Shares of online marketplace eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after GameStop increased its stake in the company as a takeover battle escalates.

headline: What’s fueling the Pokémon card frenzy?
summary: CNBC's Arjun Kharpal investigates what has made Pokémon cards more popular than ever and what has driven long lines at stores and a surge in prices.
